groupings.title: Git & GitHub
groupings.description: Commits, pull requests, issues, repo metadata, and issue-to-worktree glue driven from the real diff and plan.

groupings.title: Writing
groupings.description: Make prose read like a person wrote it.

groupings.title: Testing & QA
groupings.description: Review AI-written changes, prove a feature works, and plan how to verify what you built.

groupings.title: Planning & Design
groupings.description: Draft a plan from a rough idea, then pressure-test it before you write any code.

groupings.title: Building
groupings.description: Turn a hardened plan, spec, or issue into working code — straight-through or test-driven, gated on the repo's own tests and build.

groupings.title: Context & Handoffs
groupings.description: Carry work across sessions and agents without losing the thread.
